title: Hiring Production Engineer at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates:
Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates!
